patch.value:
## Context

PR #238 shipped the bulk of GH-157 (default score threshold via --min-score, exact phrase via --match-mode exact, --count mode, relevance ranking). Two asks remain:

1. **Structured inline query syntax**: parse `tag:domain:game status:open` tokens inside the query string as filters (complement to keyword/semantic). The equivalent --tag/--status flags already exist; this is the inline-token parsing sugar.
2. **Matched-text highlighting**: highlight the matching substring within each matched field in output. matched_fields is already surfaced; per-field text highlighting is not.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Inline `field:value` tokens (tag:, status:, type:, priority:) parsed out of the query and applied as filters; remaining tokens used for keyword/semantic match
- [ ] Documented precedence when both inline token and explicit flag are provided
- [ ] Optional --highlight to emit matched spans per field (off by default for token efficiency)
- [ ] Contracts/MCP/completions/docs updated
- [ ] Tests + 100% coverage of new logic

## Evidence
- GH-157 (open); PR #238 shipped the threshold/exact/count parts
pm search: structured inline query syntax (tag:/status:) + matched-text highlighting (GH-157 remainder)

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Shipped GH-157 remainder in branch feat/search-inline-query-highlight. (1) Inline field:value query syntax: parseInlineQueryFilters/applyInlineQueryFilters in runSearch extract tag:/status:/type:/priority: tokens from the query string (value runs to end-of-token so tag:area:search parses; first-occurrence-per-field wins). Explicit --flag wins over a conflicting inline token, surfacing search_inline_filter_ignored:<field>:flag_takes_precedence. This complements the pre-existing bootstrap parseBareKeyValueToken rewriter (which only handles UNQUOTED argv tokens) by covering quoted multi-word CLI queries AND the pm_search MCP path where the whole query arrives as one string. (2) --highlight emits per-field matched-text snippets (highlights:[{field,snippet}], «…» markers, windowed ±60 chars with … ellipsis), off by default for token efficiency; added to compact/fields projections when set. Refactored scoreDocument + highlighter onto a shared SEARCHABLE_FIELD_BUILDERS source of truth. Full wiring: register-list-query, registration-helpers normalizeSearchOptions, SEARCH_FLAG_CONTRACTS, SEARCH_CONTRACT_PARAMETER_KEYS, MCP tool-parameter-tables (+description), zsh+fish completions, contracts golden file, COMMANDS.md. 100/100/100/100 coverage, 4607 tests green, static+contracts gates pass.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Inline field:value search syntax lives in TWO complementary layers: (a) bootstrap parseBareKeyValueToken rewrites UNQUOTED argv tokens (tag:x -> --tag x) for ALL flags, generically, before commander; (b) runSearch parseInlineQueryFilters handles the in-query-STRING case (quoted multi-word CLI queries + the pm_search MCP path) for the 4 documented fields tag/status/type/priority. They never conflict (different inputs) and both yield identical applied filters. A lone inline token on the CLI hits commander's 'missing keywords' (bootstrap consumed the only positional); via MCP it hits runSearch's explicit empty-residual USAGE error.

value.note: inline parser + highlighter + shared field builders

patch.value: Shipped inline field:value query syntax (tag/status/type/priority) + --highlight matched-text snippets; full contract/MCP/completions/docs wiring; 100% coverage. Closes GH-157 remainder.
Implemented inline field:value query syntax + --highlight matched-text snippets for pm search (GH-157 remainder).
pm search parses tag:/status:/type:/priority: inline tokens and emits per-field highlight snippets on --highlight
Both shipped with full wiring and 100% coverage; complements the bootstrap unquoted-token rewriter and covers the pm_search MCP path
